codeQualityRules.documentation: 80-100 line block comment at top of each file. No inline comments. Doc comments (///) for public API only.
codeQualityRules.errorHandling: Use eyre exclusively. Every error must include context (operation, resource, reason). No custom error enums.
codeQualityRules.naming: Follow Rust naming conventions. snake_case for functions/variables, PascalCase for types.
codeQualityRules.noPartialWork: Each task must be 100% complete before marking done=true
codeQualityRules.noPlaceholders: NEVER write TODO comments or placeholder implementations. Complete each task fully.
codeQualityRules.testsMustPass: All tests must pass before committing. Run 'cargo test' to verify
codeQualityRules.zeroAllocation: CRUD operations must not allocate. Use arenas for query-scoped allocations.
codeQualityRules.zeroCopy: Return &[u8] slices from mmap. Never clone page data.

fileStructure.maxLength: Strictly aim for files under 800 lines.
fileStructure.modularity: Prefer many small modules over one large module.
fileStructure.oneStructRule: Major structs should usually have their own file.
fileStructure.barrels: Use mod.rs (or file-named modules) primarily for pub mod and pub use re-exports to create a clean public API. Avoid putting core logic in the root of a module.

idiomaticSeparation.tests: Unit tests (#[cfg(test)]) go at the bottom of the file. If tests exceed 200 lines, move them to a tests/ directory (integration style) or a separate _tests.rs submodule.

examples: feat(storage): implement SIEVE cache eviction algorithm
feat(btree): add slot array with prefix hints for fast lookup
test(hnsw): add benchmarks for SQ8 quantized distance
fix(mvcc): correct version chain visibility check
scopes: storage - Storage engine (pager, mmap, cache, wal)

concurrency.avoidConflicts: Before starting, check 'git worktree list' for active feature worktrees
concurrency.cleanup: After merging a feature, remove the worktree: 'git worktree remove ./tur-feature-<name>'
concurrency.mergeStrategy: Each feature worktree is isolated. After completion, merge from the worktree or create PR
concurrency.multipleAgents: Multiple agents can work on DIFFERENT features simultaneously using git worktrees

beforeStarting: Read this entire workflow section carefully
Check active worktrees: run 'git worktree list' to see active feature worktrees
Pick ONE feature where status=false AND no worktree exists for it
implementationCycle: STEP 1: Create feature worktree with dedicated directory
STEP 2: For EACH task in the feature.tasks array (in order):
→ Identify what files need to be created/modified
→ Create or update test module in tests/ directory
→ Write specific test case for this task
→ VERIFY test FAILS (if it passes, test is wrong or task already done)
→ Write MINIMAL code to make the test pass
→ Ensure zero-copy and zero-allocation where required
→ Focus on making THIS test pass
→ Clean up code while keeping tests green
→ Find this exact task in the feature
REPEAT 2a-2f for ALL tasks in the feature
→ Commit: git commit -m 'feat(<scope>): complete feature implementation'
→ Report any blockers or dependencies discovered

workflow.objective: Achieve CONCRETE, WORKING implementation of TurDB Rust features. Zero-copy, zero allocation, 16KB pages, 1MB RAM minimum.

referenceResources.testExamples: Look at Rust crate tests for testing patterns

testingGuidelines.coverage: Aim for >80% code coverage per module
testingGuidelines.location: Tests in #[cfg(test)] mod tests { } at end of file, or tests/ directory for integration

troubleshooting.conflictingWorktree: Feature worktree already exists? Pick a different feature.
troubleshooting.lifetimeErrors: Borrow checker issues? Review CLAUDE.md zero-copy patterns. Consider arena allocation.
troubleshooting.missingDependencies: Task depends on another incomplete feature? Note as blocker. Implement dependency first.
troubleshooting.testWontFail: Test passes immediately? Either task is already done, or test isn't testing the right thing.
troubleshooting.testWontPass: Can't make test pass? Break task into smaller steps.
troubleshooting.worktreeCleanup: When done: 'git worktree remove <path>' to clean up

todo.title: Wire WAL recovery into open_with_recovery()
todo.description: WAL recover() method exists but is NOT called during database open. frames_recovered is hardcoded to 0.
todo.impact: Data loss after crashes - crash recovery doesn't work

todo.title: Create integration test suite
todo.description: tests/ directory is empty. Need end-to-end SQL tests, multi-table queries, transaction rollback tests, crash recovery tests.

todo.title: Implement subqueries in FROM clause
todo.description: Parsed but explicitly not implemented. Planner returns bail!("subqueries in FROM clause not yet implemented")

todo.title: Implement CTEs (WITH clause)
todo.description: Parsed in parser but no planner/executor implementation.

todo.title: Implement UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT set operations
todo.description: Lexer and parser support these keywords but no executor implementation.

todo.title: Implement prepared statements
todo.description: No prepared statement support. Important for SQL injection defense.

todo.title: Add DEFAULT parsing for advanced types
todo.description: UUID, JSONB, Date/Time, Vector, Interval, Point fall back to Text. Need proper parsing.
todo.impact: Advanced type DEFAULT values don't work

todo.title: Implement window functions
todo.description: Lexer/parser support window functions (OVER PARTITION) but no executor implementation.

todo.title: Implement INSERT...SELECT
todo.description: Parsed but not executed in database layer.
todo.impact: Common data migration pattern not supported

todo.title: Implement INSERT...ON CONFLICT (upsert)
todo.description: Parsed (DoNothing, DoUpdate actions) but not executed.

todo.title: Implement ALTER TABLE execution
todo.description: All ALTER TABLE actions are parsed but return unsupported statement type.

todo.title: Implement RETURNING clause
todo.description: Not implemented for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE.

todo.title: Implement UPDATE...FROM
todo.description: Update with join/from clause not implemented.

todo.title: Add query timeout mechanism
todo.description: No timeout for long-running queries. DoS prevention.

todo.title: Add Array type decoding
todo.description: Array types return NULL when decoded. Need proper decode implementation.

todo.title: Add Composite type decoding
todo.description: Composite types return NULL when decoded.

todo.title: Add Range type decoding
todo.description: Range types (Int4Range, Int8Range, DateRange, TimestampRange) return NULL.

todo.title: Parse CREATE TYPE (enum)
todo.description: Enum types cannot be created via SQL. Need parser support.

todo.title: Add fuzz testing for parser
todo.description: No fuzz tests for SQL parser. Important for security.

todo.title: Add fuzz testing for decoder
todo.description: No fuzz tests for record decoder.

todo.title: Complete HNSW SQL integration
todo.description: HNSW index exists but SQL CREATE INDEX for HNSW may not be fully wired.
todo.impact: Vector search via SQL may be incomplete
